race.comment: LOVECATS (5) returned from a spell over 1000m at the Sunshine Coast last start and had to pull out all stops to just get home in a brave on-pace performance in heavy going. Has come of age since transferring to Matthew Dunn and she looks to be in for her best prep to date. Ideally placed to win again. DIVA ROUGE (2) has won two on the trot by an aggregate of 8.1 lengths, the latest in a Class 1 over this distance at Coffs Harbour. Goes up 1.5kgs in a tougher race but she is lightly raced and improving at a great rate. THE MAGIC MAN (3) went back from a wide gate then made significant late ground to get up for second last time out over 1100m at Scone. Freshened up since that run five weeks ago. Will be tough to hold out over an extra 100m. PATRIOTICINTENTION (6) is racing well and is probably best served by coming back in trip this afternoon. Recent trial winner RUPESTRIS (7) can run boldly first-up with the aid of the inside barrier.
